_notes: Source: AU Core Encounter (Australian realm). Target: R4 base Encounter. AU Core adds MS on status, class, serviceType, participant, participant.type, participant.individual, period, reasonCode, reasonReference, location, location.location, serviceProvider; constrains subject to [1..1 MS, au-core-patient]; adds preferred AU serviceType binding; constrains participant.individual to AU Core practitioner/practitionerrole/relatedperson; constrains reasonReference to AU Core condition/observation/procedure; constrains location.location to au-core-location; constrains serviceProvider to au-core-organization. Going source→target (R4 base), all AU-specific profile references revert to base R4 resources, MS elements are removed, and the AU preferred serviceType binding weakens to R4 example binding. Status and class both have min=1 in R4 (inherited) but AU Core marks them MS only.

drifts.description: status MustSupport removed on required element (R4 base defines min=1 on status): source mustSupport=true; R4 base differential has no mustSupport.
class MustSupport removed on required element (R4 base defines min=1 on class): source mustSupport=true; R4 base differential has no mustSupport.
serviceType MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base differential has no mustSupport.

serviceType binding changed: source preferred(https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/service-type-1) [AU health service type VS] → target example(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/service-type) [R4 example VS]. Different value sets and binding strength weakened from preferred to example.
subject cardinality relaxed: source [1..1] → target [0..1]. Min decreased from 1 to 0.
subject MustSupport removed on a previously required (min=1) element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base differential has no mustSupport.

subject reference target changed: source constrains to au-core-patient (http://hl7.org.au/fhir/core/StructureDefinition/au-core-patient) → target R4 allows Reference(Patient|Group). Target widens reference to include Group and uses base R4 resource.
participant MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base differential has no mustSupport.
participant.type MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base differential has no mustSupport.
participant.individual MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base differential has no mustSupport.

participant.individual reference targets changed: source constrains to [au-core-practitioner, au-core-practitionerrole, au-relatedperson]; target R4 allows Reference(Practitioner|PractitionerRole|RelatedPerson) base resources. AU realm-specific profiles replaced by base R4 resource types.
period MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base differential has no mustSupport.
reasonCode MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base differential has no mustSupport.
reasonReference MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base differential has no mustSupport.

reasonReference reference targets changed: source constrains to [au-core-condition, Observation, au-core-procedure]; target R4 allows Reference(Condition|Procedure|Observation|ImmunizationRecommendation). AU realm-specific profiles replaced by base R4 resource types; ImmunizationRecommendation added as a target in R4 base.
location MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base differential has no mustSupport.
location.location MustSupport removed on required element (R4 base defines min=1 on location.location): source mustSupport=true; R4 base differential has no mustSupport.

location.location reference target changed: source constrains to au-core-location (http://hl7.org.au/fhir/core/StructureDefinition/au-core-location) → target R4 allows Reference(Location). AU realm-specific profile replaced by base R4 Location resource.
serviceProvider MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base differential has no mustSupport.

serviceProvider reference target changed: source constrains to au-core-organization (http://hl7.org.au/fhir/core/StructureDefinition/au-core-organization) → target R4 allows Reference(Organization). AU realm-specific profile replaced by base R4 Organization resource.
